c.d: The range and diversity of live streaming content available on the platform, including sports, entertainment, news, and user-generated content.
The ease of navigation, design quality, and overall user experience provided by the app.
The monthly or annual fee required to access the app's content, including any free tiers or trial periods.
The range of devices (e.g., smartphones, tablets, smart TVs, gaming consoles) on which the app is available and functions effectively.
The resolution and reliability of live streams, including factors like buffering, latency, and availability of high-definition or 4K content.
Extra functionalities such as cloud DVR, multi-view options, interactive elements, and offline viewing capabilities.
